programme.desc: The Xplash action is intense as we kayak Africa's Zambezi River, go behind-the-scenes of Australia's V8 Powerboat Racing, and head north to the icy waters of Canada and Alaska for coldwater surfing.

programme.title: The Bassquatch Hunter: The Fishing Was on FIRE!
programme.desc: Mike got to live out a childhood dream of being a fireman for a day! After taking firefighter, and military veteran, Jeff Latkowski fishing in the kayaks, Jeff showed Mike what it takes to be a firefighter in the agility course that truly tests what you're made of.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep211: Kauai, Hawaii
programme.desc: Next Stop tours Jurassic Park Waterfall (aka Manawaiopuna Falls) via helicopter, kayaks with Outfitters Kauai, and goes tubing with Kauai Backcountry Adventures.

programme.title: Mapping The Blue: World's largest Marine Park
programme.desc: The Cook Islands recently announced the designation of the largest Marine Park on Earth. In stunning 4K imagery, this documentary tells the story of how Kevin Iro, founder of the park, along with his team, use a high tech GIS system to designate multi-use areas inside the pristine park.

programme.title: Sports Adventure Ep510: Kayaking the Remote Sary-Jaz River in China's Tien Shan Mountains
programme.desc: The Sickline Kayaking Team travels to the remote Sary-Jaz River, located in the Tien Shan Mountains, which straddle the borders of China, Kazakhstan, and Kyrgyzstan. Expedition leader Tomass Marnics, along with several World Champion kayakers kayak the breathtaking Eyes of God Gorge.

programme.title: Travel Quest Ep110: Botswana
programme.desc: Botswana is a wildlife lover’s dream and it’s also the home of Victoria Falls…the largest waterfalls in the world. Travel Quest's host, Bill Ball, joined a whitewater raft team in order to film the most wild and treacherous rapids in the world. He would not leave unscathed.

programme.title: Water Matters Ep103: Plastics Pollution
programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep112: Hunting for Megalodon Shark Teeth
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV goes on a hunt for Megalodon Shark teeth and takes a Deeper Dive with Megalodon Sharks, Prickly Sharks, and Sand Tiger Sharks.

programme.title: Xplash Ep111
programme.desc: The Xplash action is intense as we kayak Africa's Zambezi River, go behind-the-scenes of Australia's V8 Powerboat Racing, and head north to the icy waters of Canada and Alaska for coldwater surfing.

programme.title: The Bassquatch Hunter: The Fishing Was on FIRE!
programme.desc: Mike got to live out a childhood dream of being a fireman for a day! After taking firefighter, and military veteran, Jeff Latkowski fishing in the kayaks, Jeff showed Mike what it takes to be a firefighter in the agility course that truly tests what you're made of.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep211: Kauai, Hawaii

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Eversince
programme.desc: Can you remember the moment you knew you were hooked on snowboarding? 'Eversince' is a film about the first time, and chasing the unforgettable feeling every time after. Featuring: Lucas Debari, Jason Robinson, Keegan Valaika, Lizard King, Manuel Diaz, Bode Merrill, Nicolas Müller, Fredi Kalbermatten, Cale Zima, Brandon Cocard.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 1
programme.desc: Your friends at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 2
programme.desc: The fine folks at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 3
programme.desc: The fine folks at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 4
programme.desc: The fine folks at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Kimmy Fasani - Dose 01
programme.desc: Kimmy Fasani is a world class athlete, a loving mother, a natural leader, and a true champion of women in professional snowboarding. In Episode 1 of her Microdose series, we learn where Fasani’s glorious story begins. Featuring Shannon Dunn, Donna Carpenter, Hana Beaman, Gabe Taylor and Ryan Runke.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Kimmy Fasani - Dose 02
programme.desc: In Episode 2 of her Microdose series, we learn how Kimmy Fasani stepped away from the contest scene and into backcountry snowboarding with help from shred legend Devun Walsh and innovator Iikka Backstrom. Featuring Chris Benchetler, Devun Walsh, Adam Moran, Bryan Knox and Peter Morning.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Kimmy Fasani - Dose 03
programme.desc: As a Burton athlete, Kimmy Fasani has long been a champion of change in women's snowboarding. Innovative products. Fair pay. Better contracts. Sick ripping. Watch and be uplifted. Featuring Hana Beaman, Pat Bridges, Danny Davis, Gabe Taylor, Kevin Pearce, Bryan Knox, Adam Moran and Peter Morning.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: AfterForever
programme.desc: When resistance fades, growth begins. AfterForever is a meditation on change, exploring evolution in snowboarding and life, and asking what happens when one chapter ends and another begins.

programme.title: Wash'Dup
programme.desc: Based on a true story, this mockumentary film will follow a group of ex- snowboard filmmakers and ex-pro riders who never hung it up. Still in love with the sport and fueled by mid life crisis, these shred for lifers are extremely vulnerable to delusions of grandeur. But the dream is always “still alive” in their minds. In turn they ignore all the red flags and continue to do what seems completely irrational to everyone except for them. After a 16 year hiatus, they irresponsibly put their adult obligations behind, and join a pact to make just one last movie. But they are missing a solid presence of youth to make their movie marketable. As a remedy they end up filming with riders that span 2 generations. This unlikely alliance leads them to discover much more about snowboarding and themselves by living the snowboarding dream through an ageless lens. Filled with sketch comedy skits, this film expresses the nuanced story of a young sport reaching a level of maturity the current industry now begins to embrace. From the death of the snowboard shop, and extinction of film media, to the old pro struggling to find their way in life after the glory days are long gone, WashDup is a story that finally needs to be told.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 01
programme.desc: Elena Hight is one of the most accomplished women in snowboarding history. Interestingly, her passion for boardsports culture originated in her home state of Hawaii on the island of Kauai. This is where Elena’s Microdose series begins. Featuring Jamie Anderson, Papa Mike, Chris Owen, Louie Vito.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 02
programme.desc: From the moment she strapped into a snowboard, Elena Hight has been an innovative and visionary force in women’s snowboarding. In Episode 2 of her Microdose series, we take a look at two of Elena’s greatest achievements. Featuring Jamie Anderson, Scotty Lago and Louie Vito.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 03
programme.desc: At age 16, during the 2006 Torino Olympics, Elena Hight was the youngest American to compete in Women’s Halfpipe. In 2010, at the Vancouver Olympics, she sowed the seeds of change to come. In Episode 3 of Elena’s Microdose series we explore more. Featuring Selema Masekela, Papa Mike and Louie Vito.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 04
programme.desc: Failure in life can be our biggest teacher. In Episode 4 of her Microdose series, we learn how Elena Hight embraced failure on the global stage, embarked on transformative change, and unlocked her next level. Featuring Selema Masekela, Hana Beaman, Spencer O'Brien, Jamie Anderson, and Jeremy Jones.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 05
programme.desc: When Elena Hight made the surprising decision to set aside her Olympic routine to pursue backcountry riding, she astonished her peers and mentors. In Episode 5 of her Microdose series, we learn how and why Elena made the leap. Featuring Jeremy Jones, Hana Beaman, Todd Jones, and Jamie Anderson.

programme.title: Hwuy’xwet Pune’luxutth (Opening Penelakut)
programme.desc: This beautiful documentary follows a group of First Nation’s students at Penelakut Island Elementary School as they work with Riley McIntosh to create a new mountain bike trail for the community. Throughout the film, director Jason Mannings shares the history of Penelakut Island and its people.

programme.title: Hempel World Cup Series - Medemblik
programme.desc: The Hempel Sailing World Cup Series is back. The 2021 season takes place in Medemblik, The Netherlands, during the famous Allianz Regatta. This is the first Hempel Cup Series since the outbreak of the COVID-19 virus, and sailors are excited.A grand total of 350 sailors from 47 different countries are participating across eight Olympic classes. Watch the best moments of the competition at The Netherlands.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 5
programme.desc: For its fifth event of the sixth season, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans were invited to visit Muscat for the final event of the 2019 GC32 Racing Tour, the GC32 Oman Cup. The event, held in Muscat, has been jointly organized by Oman Sail and the host venue partners EFG Private Banking as well as fragrance brand Amouj and the Sultanate of Oman Ministry of Tourism. The Oman Cup was the final of the 2019 GC32 Racing Tour and will decide this year’s overall podium places. Unquestionably the big fight was for top spot between the local heroes Oman Air and Ernesto Bertarelli’s World Champions Alinghi.With so many teams close on the leader board, there was the potential for some crucial match races amongst the fleet.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 4 - Valkenswaard
programme.desc: Valkenswaard has welcomed international riders for the fourth leg of the Longines Global Champions Tour this year. Competition is only just beginning but riders have already proven to give their all in The Netherlands. Excitement, excellence and the best show jumping performances are about to take place in the LGCT.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 4 - Valkenswaard
programme.desc: Shanghai Swans has once again taken the victory away from Valkenswaard United during the previous leg. However, now we are in the terrain of Valkenswaard United, and they are not going to give up so easily at home. Will they be able to coordinate to ensure their victory or will some other team win the Valkenswaard leg of the Global Champions League? Find out the best moments of the competition.

programme.title: Event Rider Masters - Wiesbaden
programme.desc: The second leg in this edition of the Event Rider Masters takes place in the splendid scenery of Biebrich Palace, on the bank of the Rhine River and in the middle of the city of Wiesbaden. This park has been hosting international equestrian competitions for the past 80 years, and are now ready to host this edition of the Event Rider Masters as it debuts in Germany for the first time. Be part of the best moments of the competition in the 2019 edition.

programme.title: Don't Let The Attack Distract You

programme.title: Don't Forget Where You Come From

programme.title: Inquebrantable
programme.desc: Lupita vive en Ciudad Juárez con su hija Margarita, el esposo de Margarita es un alcohólico, mujeriego, y golpeador, la hija de Lupita, Margarita va a la universidad pero desde niña tiene una enfermedad de un mal cardiaco causado por la violencia domestica que ha sufrido desde niña, el doctor Villa le comenta a Lupita que Margarita su hija va a morir si no tiene un donante de corazón, desesperada ella se pone a vender cualquier cosa de valor que tenga en su casa para comprar el corazón en el mercado negro.

programme.title: Vecinos del Terror
programme.desc: Por accidente se les dispara un arma con el impacto matan al cuñado quien después regresa de ultratumba a cobrar venganza y ni la policía se escapa de la venganza de ultratumba

programme.title: Los Siete Sellos de la Santa Muerte
programme.desc: Una serie de extraños asesinatos están ocurriendo en la ciudad. Una investigadora de lo paranormal y un detective privado se dedican a indagar en el caso y lo que encontraran será algo que nunca imaginaron.

programme.title: Expediente 53 2.0
programme.desc: Mientras el líder de los delincuentes de la ciudad, Jack se reúne con el demonio Lilly alias Abal en un antro/table para matar y tomar las almas de sus víctimas. El FBI pide ayuda de unos sacerdotes solo que el hermano menor de Jack es poseído por Abal y ahora Jack tendrá que tomar una de las decisiones más difíciles de su vida.

programme.title: Expediente 53 3.0
programme.desc: Un extraño ser del más allá regresa con sed de venganza para acabar con todas las personas que lo han estado atormentando por todos estos años, decidiendo poseer a Jack y darle más fuerza a Baal.

programme.title: El Tirabeque
programme.desc: Sebas es redactor de un periódico digital que nadie lee, está en trámites de divorcio y tiene problemas con el alcohol. Toda su vida se desmorona hasta que le encargan un reportaje sobre los tirabeques. Lo que en un inicio parecía un trabajo tranquilo se convertirá en una investigación de consecuencias impredecibles.

programme.title: El Peluquero Romántico
programme.desc: La vida del barbero de barrio Víctor transcurre bastante tranquila. Mantiene una estricta rutina diaria tanto en el trabajo como en casa, donde pasa las noches junto a su madre escuchando boleros o viendo películas de la Época de Oro del Cine Mexicano en la televisión. Su rutina se ve alterada cuando su madre muere repentinamente. Su coqueteo con una joven camarera y su reencuentro con una antigua novia no pueden llenar el vacío dejado por su madre. Sin embargo, eso cambia cuando un día un hombre que dice ser su padre entra repentinamente a la tienda. El encuentro lo llevará a un viaje inesperado y que le cambiará la vida a Río de Janeiro.

programme.title: Expediente 53 3.0
programme.desc: Un extraño ser del más allá regresa con sed de venganza para acabar con todas las personas que lo han estado atormentando por todos estos años, decidiendo poseer a Jack y darle más fuerza a Baal.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.
